beats.title: The web tightens
beats.message: Distant skittering carries down through the pipes — the spider queen has noticed your approach.

beats.title: The Wall Crack splinters
beats.message: Dust falls. Light spills through the fracture. The colony's reach now extends to the east wall.

beats.title: The colony tires
beats.message: Workers retreat to the storm-drain. The queen's pheromones thin — push for the web or pull back to regroup.

beats.title: The web hangs heavy
beats.message: Movement above stills. The spider queen has settled into her web — every approach is now her hunting ground.

beats.title: The web falls
beats.message: The spider queen's threads snap one by one. The colony reaches the highest reach of the room — the war is yours.
